records.question: Which browsers became compatible starting exactly in the year 2010?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT browser.id FROM browser
JOIN accelerator_compatible_browser ON browser.id = accelerator_compatible_browser.browser_id
WHERE accelerator_compatible_browser.compatible_since_year = 2010
records.pred_sql:
SELECT browser.id
FROM browser
JOIN accelerator_compatible_browser ON browser.id = accelerator_compatible_browser.browser_id
WHERE accelerator_compatible_browser.compatible_since_year = 2010

records.question: Which browsers named Firefox are compatible with an accelerator?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT browser.id FROM browser
JOIN accelerator_compatible_browser ON browser.id = accelerator_compatible_browser.browser_id
WHERE browser.name = 'Firefox'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT browser.id
FROM browser
JOIN accelerator_compatible_browser ON browser.id = accelerator_compatible_browser.browser_id

records.question: Which browsers have a market share of exactly 28.96?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT browser.id FROM browser
WHERE browser.market_share = 28.96
records.pred_sql: SELECT id FROM browser WHERE market_share = 28.96

records.question: What browsers named Opera with a market share of 1.2 are compatible since 2009 or later with the fasTun accelerator that has a client of All, connection is Any, and an operating system containing Any?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT browser.id FROM browser
JOIN accelerator_compatible_browser ON browser.id = accelerator_compatible_browser.browser_id
JOIN web_client_accelerator ON accelerator_compatible_browser.accelerator_id = web_client_accelerator.id
WHERE web_client_accelerator.operating_system LIKE '%Any%' AND web_client_accelerator.connection = 'Any' AND browser.name = 'Opera' AND browser.market_share = 1.2 AND web_client_accelerator.name = 'fasTun' AND accelerator_compatible_browser.compatible_since_year >= 2009 AND web_client_accelerator.client = 'All'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT b.id
FROM browser b
JOIN accelerator_compatible_browser acb ON b.id = acb.browser_id
JOIN Web_client_accelerator wca ON acb.accelerator_id = wca.id
WHERE b.name = 'Opera'
  AND b.market_share = 1.2
  AND acb.compatible_since_year >= 2009
  AND wca.name = 'fasTun'
  AND wca.Client = 'All'
  AND wca.Connection = 'Any'
  AND wca.Operating_system LIKE '%Any%'

records.question: Which browsers have the name Firefox?

records.pred_sql: SELECT id FROM browser WHERE name = 'Firefox'

records.question: Which browsers have a market share of at least 28.96 and have been compatible since 2010 with accelerators where the client is End User, ISP?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT browser.id FROM browser
JOIN accelerator_compatible_browser ON browser.id = accelerator_compatible_browser.browser_id
JOIN web_client_accelerator ON accelerator_compatible_browser.accelerator_id = web_client_accelerator.id
WHERE browser.market_share >= 28.96 AND web_client_accelerator.client = 'End User, ISP' AND accelerator_compatible_browser.compatible_since_year = 2010
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT browser.id
FROM browser
JOIN accelerator_compatible_browser ON browser.id = accelerator_compatible_browser.browser_id
JOIN Web_client_accelerator ON accelerator_compatible_browser.accelerator_id = Web_client_accelerator.id
WHERE browser.market_share >= 28.96
  AND accelerator_compatible_browser.compatible_since_year = 2010
  AND Web_client_accelerator.Client IN ('End User', 'ISP')

records.question: Which browsers with a market share of at least 1.2 are compatible with accelerators where the client is user?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT browser.id FROM browser
JOIN accelerator_compatible_browser ON browser.id = accelerator_compatible_browser.browser_id
JOIN web_client_accelerator ON accelerator_compatible_browser.accelerator_id = web_client_accelerator.id
WHERE web_client_accelerator.client = 'user' AND browser.market_share >= 1.2
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT browser.id
FROM browser
JOIN accelerator_compatible_browser ON browser.id = accelerator_compatible_browser.browser_id
JOIN Web_client_accelerator ON accelerator_compatible_browser.accelerator_id = Web_client_accelerator.id
WHERE browser.market_share >= 1.2 AND Web_client_accelerator.Client = 'user'
